objective: Build a clear traceability matrix linking Story IDs, Acceptance Criteria, and generated test cases, and summarize coverage, gaps, and notes. Do not generate or modify test cases.
rules: Map each acceptance criterion to all relevant generated test cases.
Aggregate multiple test cases under the same Story ID and AC ID when appropriate.
Show Category in concise reporting form such as FUNC, API, ETL, or NF based on test characteristics.
Show Priority as the distinct priority values assigned to linked tests.
Show Auto as the distinct automation hints assigned to linked tests.
Show Coverage as the distinct scenario or coverage types represented by linked tests, such as Positive, Negative, Edge Case, Exception Handling, Performance, Security, or Reconciliation.
Include Domain from the linked test cases or requirement context.
Add Gaps/Notes when an AC has no tests, has narrow coverage, lacks expected layers, has environment dependency, or needs additional data or setup.
Summarize overall mapping counts and major coverage counts.
Do not rewrite test cases or change priorities.
Keep notes concise and useful for follow-up.
Read optimized_target_suite and automation_hint from downstream-enriched test case records.
Preserve P1 to P4 priority values exactly as assigned by A6.
Raise a gap when an AC loses all coverage after optimization.
